app_callbacks.h(3) Library Functions Manual app_callbacks.h(3)

NAME

app_callbacks.h - Application-level callbacks for library code.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct app_callbacks_t

Macros


#define APP_CALLBACK_VOID(callback_name)
#define APP_CALLBACK_BOOL(callback_name)
#define APP_CALLBACK_INT(callback_name)
#define APP_CALLBACK_UINT64(callback_name)
#define APP_CALLBACK_INT_TRANSPORT(callback_name, transport)
#define APP_CALLBACK_VOID_UINT8(callback_name, value)
#define APP_CALLBACK_VOID_UINT(callback_name, value)
#define APP_CALLBACK_VOID_STR(callback_name, value)
#define APP_CALLBACK_VOID_INT(callback_name, value)
#define APP_CALLBACK_PTR(callback_name)

Functions


void app_callbacks_register (const app_callbacks_t *callbacks)
const app_callbacks_t * app_callbacks_get (void)

Detailed Description

Application-level callbacks for library code.

Allows lib/ code to call application-level functions without direct dependency.

Definition in file app_callbacks.h.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define APP_CALLBACK_BOOL( callback_name)

Value:

({                                                                                                                   \


  const app_callbacks_t *__cb = app_callbacks_get();                                                                 \


  (__cb && __cb->callback_name) ? __cb->callback_name() : false;                                                     \
})


Call a void(void) callback and return bool Usage: bool result =
    APP_CALLBACK_BOOL(should_exit)


Definition at line 72 of file app_callbacks.h.


72 #define APP_CALLBACK_BOOL(callback_name)                                                                               \
73   ({                                                                                                                   \
74     const app_callbacks_t *__cb = app_callbacks_get();                                                                 \
75     (__cb && __cb->callback_name) ? __cb->callback_name() : false;                                                     \
76   })






Referenced by connection_attempt_tcp(),
    connection_attempt_websocket(), and
  session_client_like_run().






#define
  APP_CALLBACK_INT( callback_name)


Value:


({                                                                                                                   \


  const app_callbacks_t *__cb = app_callbacks_get();                                                                 \


  (__cb && __cb->callback_name) ? __cb->callback_name() : -1;                                                        \
})




Call a void(void) callback and return int Usage: int result =
    APP_CALLBACK_INT(client_crypto_init)


Definition at line 82 of file app_callbacks.h.


82 #define APP_CALLBACK_INT(callback_name)                                                                                \
83   ({                                                                                                                   \
84     const app_callbacks_t *__cb = app_callbacks_get();                                                                 \
85     (__cb && __cb->callback_name) ? __cb->callback_name() : -1;                                                        \
86   })






Referenced by connection_attempt_tcp(), and
    connection_attempt_websocket().






#define
  APP_CALLBACK_INT_TRANSPORT( callback_name, transport)


Value:


({                                                                                                                   \


  const app_callbacks_t *__cb = app_callbacks_get();                                                                 \


  (__cb && __cb->callback_name) ? __cb->callback_name(transport) : -1;                                                  \
})




Call a int(acip_transport_t *) callback Usage: int result =
    APP_CALLBACK_INT_TRANSPORT(client_crypto_handshake, transport)


Definition at line 102 of file app_callbacks.h.


102 #define APP_CALLBACK_INT_TRANSPORT(callback_name, transport)                                                           \
103   ({                                                                                                                   \
104     const app_callbacks_t *__cb = app_callbacks_get();                                                                 \
105     (__cb && __cb->callback_name) ? __cb->callback_name(transport) : -1;                                                  \
106   })






Referenced by connection_attempt_tcp().






#define
  APP_CALLBACK_PTR( callback_name)


Value:


({                                                                                                                   \


  const app_callbacks_t *__cb = app_callbacks_get();                                                                 \


  (__cb && __cb->callback_name) ? __cb->callback_name() : NULL;                                                      \
})




Get a pointer return value from callback Usage: const
    crypto_context_t *ctx =
    APP_CALLBACK_PTR(crypto_client_get_context)


Definition at line 160 of file app_callbacks.h.


160 #define APP_CALLBACK_PTR(callback_name)                                                                                \

162     const app_callbacks_t *__cb = app_callbacks_get();                                                                 \
163     (__cb && __cb->callback_name) ? __cb->callback_name() : NULL;                                                      \
164   })

#define
  APP_CALLBACK_UINT64( callback_name)


Value:


({                                                                                                                   \


  const app_callbacks_t *__cb = app_callbacks_get();                                                                 \


  (__cb && __cb->callback_name) ? __cb->callback_name() : 0ULL;                                                      \
})




Call a uint64_t(void) callback Usage: uint64_t now =
    APP_CALLBACK_UINT64(platform_get_monotonic_time_us)


Definition at line 92 of file app_callbacks.h.


92 #define APP_CALLBACK_UINT64(callback_name)                                                                             \
93   ({                                                                                                                   \
94     const app_callbacks_t *__cb = app_callbacks_get();                                                                 \
95     (__cb && __cb->callback_name) ? __cb->callback_name() : 0ULL;                                                      \
96   })






Referenced by discovery_session_process().






#define
  APP_CALLBACK_VOID( callback_name)


Value:


do {                                                                                                                 \


  const app_callbacks_t *__cb = app_callbacks_get();                                                                 \


  if (__cb && __cb->callback_name) {                                                                                 \


    __cb->callback_name();                                                                                           \


  }                                                                                                                  \
} while (0)




Call a void(void) callback safely Usage:
    APP_CALLBACK_VOID(audio_stop_thread)


Definition at line 60 of file app_callbacks.h.


60 #define APP_CALLBACK_VOID(callback_name)                                                                               \
61   do {                                                                                                                 \
62     const app_callbacks_t *__cb = app_callbacks_get();                                                                 \
63     if (__cb && __cb->callback_name) {                                                                                 \
64       __cb->callback_name();                                                                                           \
65     }                                                                                                                  \
66   } while (0)






Referenced by acds_server_shutdown(),
    client_receive_thread(), client_video_render_thread(),
    disconnect_client_for_bad_data(), discovery_session_process(),
    session_client_like_run(), and session_render_loop().






#define
  APP_CALLBACK_VOID_INT( callback_name, value)


Value:


do {                                                                                                                 \


  const app_callbacks_t *__cb = app_callbacks_get();                                                                 \


  if (__cb && __cb->callback_name) {                                                                                 \


    __cb->callback_name(value);                                                                                      \


  }                                                                                                                  \
} while (0)




Call a void(int) callback Usage:
    APP_CALLBACK_VOID_INT(server_connection_set_port, port)

Function
  Documentation




const
  app_callbacks_t * app_callbacks_get (void )


Get registered callbacks (returns NULL if not registered)


Definition at line 15 of file app_callbacks.c.

16   return g_app_callbacks;
17 }

  app_callbacks_register (const app_callbacks_t * callbacks)
